spatial_rules.primary_strategy: public-to-private sequence with a planted lightwell or courtyard as the breathing core
spatial_rules.ventilation: prefer cross ventilation through front/back openings and lightwell windows
spatial_rules.privacy: filter street views with screens, planting, and recessed glazing
spatial_rules.lot_fit: best for narrow or medium-width townhouses where a lightwell can trade some floor area for daylight and airflow
spatial_rules.section_idea: show a stair/lightwell section when possible because the vertical green core explains the style

opening_rules.window_style: large openings protected by overhangs, louvers, or balcony planting
opening_rules.default_opening_strategy: favor larger readable openings only when paired with shade or planted buffer

default_rules.homeowner_question_policy: do not ask for technical dimensions by default; expose them as style assumptions

facade_intent: Layered, shaded, airy frontage with greenery visible from the street and enough privacy filtering for urban lots.

facade_rules.massing: clean stacked volumes with recessed balconies
facade_rules.screening: vertical fins or timber-look louvers where privacy/sun control matters
facade_rules.greenery: visible planters on balcony and roof terrace
facade_rules.expression: light, airy, and shaded rather than sealed
facade_rules.rhythm: layered balcony/void rhythm with planted breaks between solid bays
facade_rules.opening_language: larger openings are acceptable only when paired with shade, screen, or planter buffers
facade_rules.shading: deep overhangs, timber-look louvers, balcony planters, and recessed glass

facade_expression.rhythm: Layered vertical rhythm with recessed balcony zones, green breaks, and shaded opening bays.
facade_expression.opening_language: Readable large openings can appear, but every glass bay needs shade, screen, or planting.
facade_expression.shading_language: Deep overhangs, vertical louvers, timber-look screens, and planter buffers.
facade_expression.material_zone_language: Warm white/light grey base with timber-look slats, stone/terracotta accent, and visible greenery.
facade_expression.client_explanation: Mặt tiền hiện đại nhiệt đới phải nhìn thoáng và xanh, nhưng kính luôn đi cùng che nắng/lọc nhìn để không thành mặt tiền nóng hoặc phô.

material_assumptions: Palette is concept intent from the modern_tropical style profile and must be confirmed as real products later.
Timber-look slats, stone, terracotta, and planting are shown as massing/material direction, not final material specification.
Planter and louver zones are concept-review cues for shade/privacy, not fabrication or irrigation details.

drawing_rules.line_emphasis: green zones and shaded openings should be readable at concept scale

drawing_notes: Label green/lightwell zones as concept intent.
Show shade/screen zones on elevation without fabrication detail.
Keep all notes at schematic homeowner-review level.
avoid_rules: sealed facade with no planted or shaded zones
dark heavy interiors without daylight strategy

large_glass.replacement: screened openings, deeper shade, and more solid/planted facade zones
large_glass.note: Suppress unshaded glass-heavy tropical expression and keep daylight through screened, shaded openings.
large_glass.drawing_note: Giảm kính theo dislike: chuyển kính lớn thành cửa có lam, ban công xanh và mảng đặc ấm hơn.

dark_closed_interior.replacement: lighter shaded openings, lightwell/green void notes, and brighter material language
dark_closed_interior.note: Suppress dark/closed language by emphasizing daylight, ventilation, and lighter shaded surfaces.
dark_closed_interior.drawing_note: Tránh cảm giác tối/kín: ghi rõ giếng trời, ban công xanh và cửa có che nắng.

louvered_shade.material_note: Map descriptors to timber-look shade/screen concept zones.
louvered_shade.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: shade/screen zones are homeowner style hints, not measured image geometry.

green_layer.material_note: Use descriptors to make planted balcony/void zones visible in elevation notes.
green_layer.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: greenery is shown as concept massing and review intent.

validation_rules: at least one green/lightwell strategy should be present for townhouse lots
major bedrooms should have exterior or lightwell access where possible

explanation_templates.style_summary: Hướng hiện đại nhiệt đới phù hợp vì ưu tiên không gian thoáng, nhiều cây và ánh sáng tự nhiên.
explanation_templates.confirmation: Em đang đề xuất hướng hiện đại xanh mát, dùng giếng trời/cây xanh và mặt tiền có lớp che nắng.
